text: It makes complete sense to feel nervous right now, and I want you to know that feeling does not mean anything is wrong with you or with tomorrow. Fear before something medical is just your mind trying to protect you, and it means you take this seriously. The people who will be with you tomorrow have done this many times, and they will be paying close attention to you the whole way through. You do not have to be brave or calm or anything in particular. Just show up, and let them take care of you. I will be thinking of you, and I cannot wait to hear your voice on the other side of it.
